# LuxDL Docs

> Elegant & Performant Deep Learning in JuliaLang

Model with the elegance of Julia, and the performance of XLA.

## Table of Contents

### Getting Started

- [Introduction {#getting-started}](/previews/PR1691/introduction.md)
- [Why we wrote Lux? {#Why-we-wrote-Lux?}](/previews/PR1691/introduction/overview.md)

- [Updating to Lux v1 {#updating-to-v1}](/previews/PR1691/introduction/updating_to_v1.md)
- [Citation {#Citation}](/previews/PR1691/introduction/citation.md)

- [Tutorials](/previews/PR1691/tutorials.md)

- [ConvMixer on CIFAR-10 {#ConvMixer-on-CIFAR-10}](/previews/PR1691/tutorials/intermediate/9_CIFAR10_conv_mixer.md)
